creator: martin@arp242.net
text:
Update to version 3.2.2

I'm also confused about the pkg-message of this port, it says you need to be a
member of the group games in order to load savegames.
The angband binary is installed as a setgid with the gid of games, so I'm
confused why the user running angband also needs to be in games?
Also, I've been playing angband for many years, and I've never put myself in
the games group...

Did I miss something?
